name: Dog Fest Duck Meat Bones 55G
description: Real bones for real dogs. Chewy munchy sticks with duck meat on both sides. Let your dog enjoy the great taste of oven-backed duck while "brushing" its teeth at the same time. Composition: duck, rawhide, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 33, crude fat 3.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4.5, moisture 18.
